series_metadata.series_title: Quality Enhancement Developmental Center Internal Evaluations
series_metadata.series_description: Reports, correspondence, plans of correction, observation notes, general record review notes, interview notes, medication pass notes, health care services notes, environmental notes, operations notes, schedules.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain for five years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
